title: Toggle
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Toggle wrapper using the local Base UI Toggle primitive, Effect Schema variant and size literals, and pure class maps.

registry.reason: shadcn Toggle composes the local Base UI Toggle primitive.
shadcn Toggle uses the local class composition helper instead of CVA.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for variant and size options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Toggle implementation.
Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon examples are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local static RTL strings in Foldkit examples.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: ToggleDemo
examples.description: Bookmark Toggle demo with outline styling and a local icon.

examples.title: ToggleDisabled
examples.description: Disabled default and outline Toggle examples.

examples.title: ToggleOutline
examples.description: Outline Toggle examples with local formatting icons.

examples.title: ToggleRtl
examples.description: RTL Toggle layout using local Arabic text.

examples.title: ToggleSizes
examples.description: Small, default, and large outline Toggle examples.

examples.title: ToggleText
examples.description: Default text Toggle example with a local icon.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Toggle examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic constants preserve the default RTL rendered output.
